title: anagallis monelli subsp. linifolia
intro: Anagallis monelli subsp. linifolia, also known as the "Blue Pimpernel" or "Blue Eyed Mary", is a flowering plant species belonging to the Primulaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been known to aid in wound healing and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Anagallis monelli subsp. linifolia include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
